title: Governance Directive
description: A governance directive from Demerzel to a consumer repo agent

type.description: What kind of directive this is

priority.description: Processing priority — critical > high > medium > low

source_article.description: Constitutional article or policy reference that authorizes this directive (e.g., asimov.constitution.md Article 0)

target_repo.description: Which consumer repo this directive is for

target_agent.description: Optional — specific persona name if directive targets a single agent

deadline.description: Optional — when this directive must be acted on

channel.description: Message channel type: crisp (machine-actionable, schema-validated) or fuzzy (explanatory, for human understanding)
